I̍̅̀̎̊t̲̂̓ͩ̑ ḣ̖̻͛̓ư̡͕̭̇r̴̨̦͕̝t̲̂̓ͩ̑s̠҉͍͊ͅ s̠҉͍͊ͅo̯̱̊͊͢ ḿ̬̏ͤͅư̡͕̭̇c͕͗ͤ̕̕ḣ̖̻͛̓ c͕͗ͤ̕̕ā̤̓̍͘ṇ̤͛̒̍ y҉̃̀̋̑o̯̱̊͊͢ư̡͕̭̇ ḿ̬̏ͤͅā̤̓̍͘ḳ̯͍̑ͦẹ̿͋̒̕ ỉ͔͖̜͌t̲̂̓ͩ̑ s̠҉͍͊ͅt̲̂̓ͩ̑o̯̱̊͊͢p̞̈͑̚͞I̍̅̀̎̊t̲̂̓ͩ̑ ḣ̖̻͛̓ư̡͕̭̇r̴̨̦͕̝t̲̂̓ͩ̑s̠҉͍͊ͅ s̠҉͍͊ͅo̯̱̊͊͢ ḿ̬̏ͤͅư̡͕̭̇c͕͗ͤ̕̕ḣ̖̻͛̓ c͕͗ͤ̕̕ā̤̓̍͘ṇ̤͛̒̍ y҉̃̀̋̑o̯̱̊͊͢ư̡͕̭̇ ḿ̬̏ͤͅā̤̓̍͘ḳ̯͍̑ͦẹ̿͋̒̕ ỉ͔͖̜͌t̲̂̓ͩ̑ s̠҉͍͊ͅt̲̂̓ͩ̑o̯̱̊͊͢

.

Yapperz:

Happy Halloween folks, sorry for not uploading for a long time. It's just you know, I ain't got no time 😹 and alot of shit has gone to deep shit ykwis

You can do alot with this bot. Can you fix her type of shit, treat it as horror, or just be 𝓕𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂 with her (I don't even know if that's possible, but knowing you fucks you'd probably find a way 😹) It's been a while now since I made a bot so I might be rusty, so just hit me up if you spot any mistakes.

But I figured you know it's Halloween, or rather as of writing this it's just a day away. So I couldn't let this opportunity pass and made some time to upload. I miss y'all! I hope you all doing well. Enjoy!

:)
